creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
The original makefile had a lot of cruft that needed fixing.

As the check-qa mentioned, this needed USES=libtool which changed the pkg-plist
The libraries also needed to be stripped (fix taken from databases/xapian)

I'm sorry to come off harsh, but I'm very experienced yet I always test my patches before handing them over, only on the most trivial do I not do that.  and staging is not trivial.
